message:
feat(formal,runtime,test): expand formal verification coverage and runtime refinements

Formal Verification Coverage (+423 lines):
  - invariant_theorem_test_link_map.json: 101-line mapping linking Lean
    invariant theorems to their corresponding Rust test implementations,
    enabling automated coverage validation
  - runtime_state_refinement_map.json: 77-line mapping connecting runtime
    state machine definitions to their refinement proofs
  - tests/lean_invariant_theorem_test_link_map.rs: comprehensive test suite
    validating the invariant↔test linkage map with 132+ test lines
  - tests/runtime_state_refinement_map.rs: 106-line test suite for runtime
    state refinement validation
  - formal/lean/coverage/README.md: documentation for coverage tracking

Runtime & Core Improvements:
  - cx/scope.rs: add explicit drain after cancellation to guarantee
    region close quiescence when backup admission fails
  - runtime/spawn_blocking.rs: blocking task spawn refinements
  - runtime/task_handle.rs: task handle lifecycle improvements
  - sync/pool.rs: pool management enhancements (+21 lines)
  - record/symbol_obligation_tracker.rs: obligation tracking cleanup
  - test_logging.rs: expanded structured test logging infrastructure
    with +120 lines of improvements for better diagnostic output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -213,9 +213,19 @@ It also carries the cross-entity liveness composition contract
 `lean.track3.cross_entity_liveness.v1` (source bead `asupersync-24rak`), which
 binds cancel-ladder, race-loser-drain, and close-quiescence theorem segments to
 end-to-end conformance consumers and required harness artifacts.
+The contract now includes:
+- segment-level theorem source anchors (`formal/lean/Asupersync.lean` lines),
+- explicit assumption IDs per segment and per end-to-end guarantee,
+- a canonical assumption catalog tied to runtime evidence references.
 
 Validation for this artifact is enforced in `tests/lean_invariant_theorem_test_link_map.rs`.
 
+`runtime_state_refinement_map.json` mirrors this via
+`cross_entity_liveness_contract` fields:
+- `theorem_sources` for each segment,
+- `required_assumptions` per segment,
+- `assumption_ids` on end-to-end guarantee rows.
+
 ## CI Verification Profiles
 
 `ci_verification_profiles.json` defines three deterministic Lean verification tiers:
